commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: docs(skills): regenerate gog SKILL.md from official gogcli command reference
target.body:
## Summary

The `skills/gog/SKILL.md` bundled in OpenClaw was significantly out of date (4,574 bytes) compared to the official gogcli command reference. It covered only a fraction of gogcli's capabilities.

This PR regenerates the skill file from the official `openclaw/gogcli` documentation (`docs/commands/README.md` and README).

## Changes

**Before**: 4,574 bytes / 117 lines — basic Gmail/Calendar/Drive/Contacts/Sheets/Docs examples only

**After**: 28,705 bytes / 623 lines — complete coverage

### Newly documented services and commands

| Category | What's new |
|----------|------------|
| **Auth & Config** | Full command trees: service-account, tokens, keyring, no-send guards, aliases |
| **Classroom** | Complete: courses, roster, coursework, materials, submissions, announcements, topics, guardians, invitations |
| **Chat** | Complete: spaces, messages, threads, direct messages, reactions |
| **Maps** | Complete: places search/details, directions, geocode, reverse-geocode, distance matrix |
| **YouTube** | Complete: videos, channels, playlists, subscriptions, search, comments |
| **Forms** | Complete: create, questions, responses, watch |
| **Meet** | Complete: create, get, participants, history, end |
| **Slides** | Complete: slides, elements, tables, text styling, create-from-markdown |
| **Tasks** | Complete: add, list, update, done, clear, lists |
| **Photos** | Complete: list, download, search, picker |
| **Keep** | Complete: notes create, list, search, attachment |
| **Analytics** | GA4 accounts and reports |
| **Search Console** | Queries, sitemaps, sites |
| **Sites** | List, search, URLs |
| **Admin** | Users, groups, orgunits for Workspace |
| **Backup** | Init, push, verify, export, cat |
| **Apps Script** | Create, content, run |
| **Zoom** | Auth setup |
| **MCP** | Typed stdio server configuration |
| **Gmail advanced** | Settings (autoforward, delegates, filters, sendas, vacation, watch), tracking, batch ops |
| **Calendar advanced** | create-calendar, delete-calendar, subscribe, unsubscribe, move, focus-time, out-of-office, working-location, propose-time |
| **Drive advanced** | Audits, changes, labels, comments, revisions, shortcuts, bulk operations, activity |
| **Docs advanced** | Tables, tabs, named ranges, comments, images, chips, page layout |
| **Sheets advanced** | Tables, charts, conditional formatting, banding, validation, named ranges |

### Additional content

- Environment variable reference (`GOG_ACCOUNT`, `GOG_KEYRING_BACKEND`, etc.)
- Headless/container setup with keyring configuration
- Scripting guidance (`--json`, `--no-input`, `--dry-run`)
- Reference to `gog --help` for the latest flags

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? `No` — documentation only

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? `No`

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? `No`

What is the highest-risk area?
- None — this is a documentation/skill file update only

## Current review state

What is the next action?
- Maintainer review
target.author: zhiqiang26
